title: icy showy argentinian sausage paella
description: this show-off dish features spicy argentinian sausage and silky saffron-infused rice, all in a single pan.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat
add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes
add the sliced argentinian sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes
add the uncooked white rice and chicken broth to the pan, stirring to combine
bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes
stir in the saffron threads, smoked paprika, and bhuna spice blend
cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed
stir in the lemon juice and cook for 1 minute
remove the pan from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes
fluff the paella with a fork and serve hot
serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired
